name: Abyssal Blade
description: The lost blade of the Commander of the Abyss, this edge cuts into an enemy's soul.

abilities.name: Overwhelm
abilities.description: Instantly stuns the target enemy unit. Pierces debuff immunity. Cooldown: 35. Mana Cost: 75. Cast Range: 150. Duration: 1.6.

abilities.name: Bash
abilities.description: Grants the wielder's attacks a chance to stun the target and deal bonus physical damage. Cooldown: 2.3. Mana Cost: 0. Proc Chance: 25%. Damage: 120. Stun Duration: 1.2.
